heroSubtitle: Specialized intensive care for acute neurological emergencies and brain disorders
approachBody: Our neurocritical care team provides specialized intensive care for patients with acute neurological emergencies. Multiple CCPSA physicians hold board certification in Neurocritical Care, offering expert management of complex neurological conditions in the ICU setting.

items.title: Acute Ischemic & Hemorrhagic Stroke
items.description: Intensive management of acute cerebrovascular events.

items.title: Traumatic Brain Injury
items.description: Expert care for severe head injuries and complications.

items.title: Spinal Cord Injury
items.description: Acute care and stabilization of spinal injuries.

items.title: Neuromuscular Respiratory Failure
items.description: Management of Guillain-Barre, myasthenia gravis, and related conditions.

items.title: Brain Tumor Complications
items.description: Critical care for acute tumor-related emergencies.

items.title: Post-Neurosurgical Care
items.description: Intensive monitoring and management after brain surgery.

items.title: Continuous EEG Monitoring
items.description: 24/7 brain activity monitoring and seizure detection.

items.title: Family & Goals of Care
items.description: Compassionate communication and advance care planning.

ctaBody: Contact us today to learn more about our neurocritical care services and schedule your consultation.
